query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS donation_campaigns (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  campaign_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  campaign_slug VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  goal_amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  raised_amount DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  donor_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  start_date DATE NOT NULL,
  end_date DATE,
  campaign_type ENUM('general', 'capital', 'emergency', 'program', 'matching', 'annual') DEFAULT 'general',
  matching_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  matching_ratio DECIMAL(3,1) DEFAULT 1.0,
  matching_cap DECIMAL(12,2),
  matching_sponsor VARCHAR(255),
  featured_image_url VARCHAR(500),
  status ENUM('draft', 'active', 'paused', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'draft',
  designation VARCHAR(255),
  thank_you_message TEXT,
  created_by INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS donor_acknowledgments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  donation_id INT,
  donor_id INT,
  donor_name VARCHAR(255),
  donor_email VARCHAR(255),
  donor_address TEXT,
  donation_amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  donation_date DATE,
  acknowledgment_type ENUM('receipt', 'thank_you', 'annual_summary', 'tax_letter') DEFAULT 'receipt',
  letter_content TEXT,
  sent_date TIMESTAMP,
  sent_method ENUM('email', 'mail', 'both') DEFAULT 'email',
  tax_year INT,
  is_tax_deductible BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  ein_displayed VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '508(c)(1)(a)',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
